Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention.VersionProvider.Builder

Packages that use VersionProvider.Builder
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention
Convention-endpoints mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the "internet conventions" surface (favicon, robots, sitemap, version, well-known) every public-facing service eventually grows.

  • Uses of VersionProvider.Builder in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention that return VersionProvider.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static VersionProvider.Builder
    VersionProvider.create()
    Creates a new builder, with @Value-annotated fields populated through BeanInstantiator from the active Settings chain.
    static VersionProvider.Builder
    VersionProvider.create(BeanStore beanStore)
    Creates a new builder using the supplied BeanStore for @Value-resolution and dependency injection.
    VersionProvider.Builder
    VersionProvider.Builder.entries(Map<String,String> values)
    Bulk-set entries from a map.
    VersionProvider.Builder
    VersionProvider.Builder.entry(String key, String value)
    Sets a single entry, overwriting any prior value for that key.
    VersionProvider.Builder
    VersionProvider.Builder.fromGitProperties()
    Reads git.commit.id, git.branch, and git.build.time from /git.properties on the VersionProvider classloader.
    VersionProvider.Builder
    VersionProvider.Builder.fromGitProperties(ClassLoader classLoader)
    Reads git.properties from the supplied classloader.
    VersionProvider.Builder
    VersionProvider.Builder.fromJavaVersion()
    Adds the running JVM's java.version system property as the javaVersion entry, unless an earlier fromManifest(...) call already supplied one from Build-Jdk.
    VersionProvider.Builder
    VersionProvider.Builder.fromManifest()
    Reads Implementation-Title, Implementation-Version, Implementation-Vendor, and Build-Jdk from /META-INF/MANIFEST.MF on the VersionProvider classloader.
    VersionProvider.Builder
    VersionProvider.Builder.fromManifest(ClassLoader classLoader)
    Reads manifest attributes from /META-INF/MANIFEST.MF on the supplied classloader.
    VersionProvider.Builder
    VersionProvider.Builder.fromManifest(Manifest manifest)
    Reads a Manifest that the importer registered as a bean (e.g.
